ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player (e.g., abdelal01) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the player's agent */,
  "player_representative_id" TEXT /* ID of the player's representative or union representative */,
  "draft_details" TEXT /* Information about the player's draft history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "team_owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the team's owner or ownership group */,
  "team_general_manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the team's general manager */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "league_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the league's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player in the contract */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team in the contract */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league in the contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player for the contract */,
  "season_start" INTEGER /* Season start year */,
  "season_end" INTEGER /* Season end year */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie contract, extension, free agent signing) */,
  "contract_guaranteed_amount" INTEGER /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "contract_bonus_structure" TEXT /* Details about any bonuses included in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Transfer fee paid by the new team */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "transfer_fees_paid" INTEGER /* Amount of fees paid by the new team during the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Team field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Team three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Team free throw percentage */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the playoffs */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, analyst) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the financials are recorded */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue for the season */,
  "expenses" INTEGER /* Total expenses for the season */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Net profit for the season */,
  "sponsorship_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from sponsorships */,
  "merchandise_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from merchandise sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_finances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the financials are recorded */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue for the league in the season */,
  "expenses" INTEGER /* Total expenses for the league in the season */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Net profit for the league in the season */,
  "broadcasting_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from broadcasting rights */,
  "licensing_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from licensing agreements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_finances_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "recovery_days" INTEGER /* Number of days required for recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rule became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_rules_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_draft_picks" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
